kinesisanalyticsv2.applicationoutput.lam.Docs: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the destination Lambda function to write to.  To specify an earlier version of the Lambda function than the latest, include the Lambda function version in the Lambda function ARN. For more information about Lambda ARNs, see [Example ARNs: Amazon Lambda](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/general/latest/gr/aws-arns-and-namespaces.html#arn-syntax-lambda)
